rationale: internal/agentmetrics package implements loader (run-store first, bundles fallback) + bucket classifier with already_satisfied→success, plus tests for bucket assignment, run-store/bundle dedupe, routing enrichment, and explicit-field precedence.

findings.summary: Implementation lives in commit 67c0f997 (loader.go, bucket.go, types.go + tests, 801 lines); the abb746e7 diff shown here is only the post-merge execution-evidence checkpoint.
